items.title: JPMorgan Expands in Dubai, Eyes More Business With Mid-Cap Firms

items.title: JPMorgan to Shut Mobility Payment Platform Amid Profitability Concerns
items.description: JPM will shut its loss-making VW Pay platform as rising volumes fail to offset mounting losses and no clear path to profitability.
